prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约7904名→8874名→7342名→5523名→6528名，整体呈波动下行趋势，2024年大幅前移至5523名后2025年回退至6528名，近两年波动幅度约1000名；该校在云南理科/物理类计划数：2021年72人、2022年72人、2023年71人、2024年72人、2025年66人；2026年计划48人，较2025年减少18人（缩招约27%），招生名额明显缩减，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 苏州大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第46名，近年排名稳定在43–46名区间，属全国中上游水平；2026年声誉评价偏负面（涉及校园安全事件），但2024年声誉偏正面（食堂改善获好评）；抖音热度排名第46位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上；未见明显投档断档记录。整体声誉中性偏正面，对报考热度有一定支撑；第五轮学科评估中，体育学A-、药学A-为代表性优势学科；材料科学与工程、纺织工程等传统工科亦有较强实力，与招生专业中的材料类、纺织类等对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等苏大优势工科专业社会热度持续高热（2024年热指数70–77），临床医学、口腔医学等医学类专业热度稳定偏热；本省2026年高考总报名约37.79万人，较2025年（约28.57万人）大幅增加约32%，物理类考生估算约22.92万人，竞争显著加剧；苏州大学位于江苏省苏州市（长三角经济发达地区），对西南省份考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在云南招生占比约2.2%–2.5%，属中等偏低水平，跨省报考热度受地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次6528名、2026年计划大幅缩招27%（使位次前移）、本省物理类考生增加约32%（使位次后移）以及学校声誉中性偏正面、工科专业热度持续较高等因素，缩招效应略大于考生增加效应，预计2026年最低位次较2025年有所前移；预测最低位次约5500名，区间5000–6000名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 7904 → 8874 → 7342 → 5523 → 6528, showing a fluctuating downward trend. In 2024, it significantly advanced to 5523, then retreated to 6528 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 1000 positions in recent two years. The university's enrollment plan for Science/Physics Category in Yunnan: 72 in 2021, 72 in 2022, 71 in 2023, 72 in 2024, 66 in 2025; 48 in 2026, a decrease of 18 from 2025 (a reduction of about 27%). The enrollment quota has significantly shrunk, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. It ranked 46th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 43–46 range in recent years, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. In 2026, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (involving campus safety incidents), but in 2024, it was somewhat positive (cafeteria improvements received praise). Its Douyin popularity ranking is 46th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure. No significant enrollment gaps have been recorded. Overall reputation is neutral to slightly positive, providing some support for application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Physical Education (A-) and Pharmacy (A-) are representative advantageous disciplines. Traditional engineering fields such as Materials Science and Engineering and Textile Engineering also have strong strength, corresponding to the Materials and Textile categories in the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and other advantageous engineering majors at Soochow University continue to be highly popular (heat index 70–77 in 2024). Medical majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology maintain stable and relatively high popularity. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao registrants in the province is approximately 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% from 2025 (approximately 285,700). The estimated number of Physics Category examinees is about 229,200, leading to intensified competition. Soochow University is located in Suzhou, Jiangsu Province (a developed region in the Yangtze River Delta), which has strong regional appeal to candidates from southwestern provinces. The university's enrollment proportion in Yunnan is about 2.2%–2.5%, which is moderately low, and cross-provincial application enthusiasm is influenced by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 6528, the significant enrollment reduction of 27% in 2026 (which pushes the ranking forward), the increase of about 32% in Physics Category examinees in the province (which pushes the ranking backward), the neutral-to-positive university reputation, and the sustained high popularity of engineering majors, the enrollment reduction effect slightly outweighs the examinee increase effect. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will advance compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5500, with a range of 5000–6000.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Stomatology
- Computer Science and Technology
- Software Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Artificial Intelligence
- Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Electronic Information
- Statistics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials (Materials Science and Engineering, Polymer Materials and Engineering)
- Textile Engineering
- Nursing
- Metallurgical Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 5000–6000, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering, Integrated Circuits, etc.), use Tier 1 Clinical Medicine/Computer Science as a reach, and Tier 3 Materials/Textile Engineering as a safety. For rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<5000), prioritize Tier 1 Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program) and Stomatology.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 1061 → 1254 → 1200 → 1867 → 1914, showing a gradual backward trend year by year, with a cumulative backward shift of about 714 places in the last 3 years, and a baseline of about 1914 in 2025; the university's planned enrollment in Yunnan for liberal arts/history category: 14 in 2021, 14 in 2022, 15 in 2023, 15 in 2024, 18 in 2025; planned enrollment of 22 in 2026, an increase of 4 compared to 2025 (expansion of about 22%), with a significant increase in admission slots, leading to intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked 46th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 43–46 range in recent years, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (involving campus safety incidents), but the 2024 reputation was somewhat positive (cafeteria improvements received praise); Douyin popularity ranking 46th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure; no obvious admission cutoff gaps recorded. Overall reputation is neutral to slightly positive; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Physical Education A- and Pharmacy A- are representative advantageous disciplines; liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature, though not rated A-class, have a certain recognition outside the province as a comprehensive university.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a relatively high social popularity (2023 heat index 67.8), Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese category recommended (heat index 67.4), Teacher Training/Education category differentiated and wait-and-see; the province's total college entrance exam registration in 2026 is about 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (about 285,700), with history category candidates estimated at about 148,600, leading to significantly intensified competition; Soochow University is located in Suzhou, Jiangsu Province (Yangtze River Delta economically developed region), which has strong regional appeal to candidates from southwestern provinces; the university's enrollment proportion in Yunnan is about 2.2%–2.5%, and cross-province application popularity is influenced by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1914, the 2026 planned enrollment expansion of 22% (causing a backward shift in ranking), the increase of about 32% in history category candidates in the province (causing a backward shift in ranking), and the university's neutral-to-positive reputation, along with the relatively high popularity of liberal arts majors like Law, the dual superposition of enrollment expansion and candidate increase intensifies competition, and it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 2199, with a range of 1869–2529.
